title: ContractEnvelope
description: Canonical success response envelope. Every contract surface response must conform to this shape.

contract_version.description: Envelope format version. Fixed at 1.0.0 until a breaking shape change.

resource.description: Dot-separated resource name, e.g. tasks.list or runtime.capabilities.

data.description: Primary payload. May be any JSON value. null on error responses.

summary.description: One human-readable sentence suitable for LLM answers and card renders.

suggested_actions.description: Ordered list of next actions. May be empty.

meta.description: Structured interpretation for agents and card UIs. Omit when empty.
